input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.2.4.6 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.2.4.6
            TITLE: the restrictor must not be part of the movable portion of a barrel throttle body.

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.2.4.6: The restrictor must not be part of the movable portion of a barrel throttle body.
IC.2.4.6 The restrictor must not be part of the movable portion of a barrel throttle body.

final_answer: The restrictor must not be part of the movable portion of a barrel throttle body.
